action.reasoning: Observation: the 30-epoch checkpoint improved local validation but worsened hidden mae_60min versus the earlier backed-up checkpoint. Analysis: the backup checkpoint (checkpoints/best_overlap_baseline.pt) corresponds to the previously best hidden score when combined with current overlap/latest-window predict.py. Decision: resubmit the backup checkpoint now to ensure the best evaluated artifact is restored before doing any further risky changes.
